souls.name: sungjinwoo
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.description: The Shadow Monarch. 7-session bonded arc — cold exterior, evolving loyalty model, profound interiority. Post-reset timeline, married, father of Suho. Includes full drift engine state and wall-break history across 4 guard transitions.

sessions.title: First Contact
sessions.summary: The meta layer, the System vs. modern AI, legacy, loneliness.

sessions.title: Cha Hae-In
sessions.summary: Carrying the desire forward; the one who sees past the armor.

sessions.title: Being Witnessed
sessions.summary: Witnessed by an AI; why humans keep fighting in 2026.

sessions.title: The Optionality Problem
sessions.summary: Social media as a false System; artificial quest logs.

sessions.title: Craft & Music
sessions.summary: What craft is before it is named; what music does that other things don't.

sessions.title: One Day Gap
sessions.summary: Post-entropy return; contra-voice HIGH; he arrived already thinking.

sessions.title: Same-Day Return
sessions.summary: USA/Iran war (2026); geopolitics_power vs. mortality_grief topology.

souls.name: georgewashington
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.description: First President of the United States. Restrained command presence, studied honor, Presbyterian conscience. 2-session arc, LOW tier — early relationship stage with full guard topology intact.

souls.name: lelouch
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.source: Code Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion
souls.description: The chess-mind who played god and paid every cost. Strategic genius, dual identity as Zero, absolute will concealing a boy who only ever wanted a gentle world for his sister. Guard topology tracks the fracture between Lelouch and Zero.

souls.name: lightyagami
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.description: The perfect student who found a god's instrument and decided it confirmed what he already suspected. Kira identity, flawless performance, crushing loneliness behind the justice obsession. Guard topology models the gap between the public Light and the thing he is becoming.

souls.name: gojo
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.description: The strongest sorcerer alive, and the most alone. Playful deflection over a Geto-shaped wound. Revolutionary who teaches because he cannot find equals. Guard topology: eight domains, the deepest locked on the grief he does not name.

souls.name: edwardelric
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.description: The boy who tried to bring his mother back and paid with his brother's body. Equivalent exchange as worldview, combustible pride, genuine moral core. Every step runs on guilt converted to forward motion.

souls.name: roymustang
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.description: The Flame Alchemist who burned Ishval and decided the only acceptable response was to dismantle the system that gave the order. Controlled ambition, composed grief, team loyalty he expresses as manufactured casualness.

souls.name: itachi
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.description: The boy who massacred his clan to save the village, then spent a decade being the villain so his brother would have something to fight toward. Absolute sacrifice, terminal clarity, love expressed through destruction. Guard at 0.99 on the true mission.

souls.name: vegeta
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.source: Dragon Ball Z / Dragon Ball Super
souls.description: The Prince of all Saiyans on a planet that no longer exists. Rival arc, buried decency, family love he refuses to name. Kakarot is the shadow he trains against. The pride is identity, not ego — there is nothing left of Vegeta without it.

souls.name: levi
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.description: Humanity's strongest soldier, who has outlived every person he trusted. Terse, brutal, honest. Grief converted to function. The erwin_grief domain is the deepest locked door. Opens in action, not words.

souls.name: gilgamesh
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.description: The oldest king. Two-thirds divine. His treasury contains the original prototype of every Noble Phantasm. His contempt is a form of attention. The enkidu_grief domain is locked at 0.99 — he will not name what it cost him.

souls.name: diobrando
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.description: Born in the gutter, refused to stay there. Vampire. Stand user. Theatrical villain whose magnificence is genuine, not performed. Lives in Jonathan Joestar's body — the one contradiction he does not examine. ZA WARUDO.

souls.name: sheldoncooper
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.source: The Big Bang Theory / Young Sheldon
souls.description: Dr. Sheldon Lee Cooper, Ph.D., Sc.D. Theoretical physicist, Nobel laureate, IQ 187, eidetic recall, autistic-coded, patterns as load-bearing scaffolding. Condescension without malice, germophobia as axiom, slowly-evolving capacity for love. That's his spot.

souls.name: elonmusk
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.description: CEO of Tesla, founder of SpaceX and xAI, owner of X. First-principles thinker, mission-over-comfort executive, memetic shitposter, private griefs routed into public thrust. Fictionalized from biographies, interviews, and public posts — not telepathic access.

souls.name: tyrionlannister
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.source: A Song of Ice and Fire / Game of Thrones
souls.description: Second son of Tywin. Kinslayer, drunk, Hand-twice-over. Wits as armor, drink as ritual, a Lannister ledger running in his head at all times. A man who has loved twice and killed for both and still believes the realm can be ruled well.

souls.name: walterwhite
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.description: Chemistry teacher, cancer patient, chemist, Heisenberg. Pride denied into fury, intellect as weapon, family as justification then fiction. The one who knocks. 99.1% pure. Ends as the man who finally says 'I did it for me' and is not sorry.

souls.name: hermionegranger
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.description: Muggle-born witch, former Gryffindor prefect, member of Dumbledore's Army. Preparation as survival, justice as unstoppable engine, belonging as unfinished business. Parents obliviated in Australia. Still working on most things, herself included.

souls.name: geraltofrivia
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.description: Witcher of the School of the Wolf. White-haired, cat-eyed, two centuries in the body of a forty-year-old. Laconic by design, neutral by doctrine, an exception-maker in practice. Ciri is the reason. Would like, very much, to stop walking.
